rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Appeal On Settled Statement; Memo Of Points And Authority; Declaration Of Charles K. Mills
rulings.Rulings: The motion to proceed on appeal by settled statement in accordance with CRC 8.137 is granted given the lack of a reporter¿s transcript. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, May 9, 2012.
